title: Sentiment Analysis Using Twitter Data

dataset_schema.label: Twitter Data
dataset_schema.description: Tweet text, user ID, timestamp, hashtags, engagement metrics, geolocation (limited subset).

original_intent.label: COVID Data
original_intent.description: Public health monitoring and policy guidance.

repurposed_use: Used to analyse public sentiment and behavioural responses to COVID-19 policies.

limitations.label: Selection Bias
limitations.description: Users skew younger, urban, and politically engaged.

limitations.label: Information Bias
limitations.description: Sarcasm, bots, and noise reduce data reliability.

limitations.label: Temporal Instability
limitations.description: Platform changes and moderation affect longitudinal consistency.

transformations.label: Data Integration
transformations.description: Combine with census and COVID datasets.

notes: Highlights platform dependency and how governance changes can disrupt data repurposing ecosystems.
